title: auNOTomy
body:
auNOTomy is a game idea about a lack of autonomy. I made three 3D character models in Womp.com.

<iframe 

    src="https://beta.womp.com/discover?preview=l1fv09guxx455p2h" 

    width="100%" 

    height="500px" 

    frameborder="0" 

    allow="camera; gyroscope; accelerometer; magnetometer; xr-spatial-tracking;"

    allowfullscreen>

</iframe>
